text: {"is_complete": false, "next_step": {"type": "form", "prompt_text": "Medical deferment requires a Medical Certificate from a Government Hospital — UMMC counts, but private clinic MCs are rejected outright. Upload it along with your personal statement (1 page explaining the reason, intended return date, and what you'll do during the deferment).", "config": {"fields": [{"key": "mc", "label": "Medical Certificate (Government Hospital only)", "field_type": "file", "required": true, "accepts": ["application/pdf", "image/*"]}, {"key": "personal_statement", "label": "Personal statement (PDF, 1 page)", "field_type": "file", "required": true, "accepts": ["application/pdf"]}, {"key": "return_semester", "label": "Intended return semester", "field_type": "text", "required": true, "placeholder": "e.g. Semester 1, 2026/2027"}]}}, "reasoning": "Medical reason requires Government Hospital MC (UMMC counts) — most common rejection reason is private GP MC. Personal statement is mandatory for ALL deferment applications. Return semester is needed so the Programme Coordinator can flag re-registration window.", "running_summary": "Year 3 student requesting medical deferment.", "citations": ["Documents Required", "Common Pitfalls"]}
